proposal1.heroHeadline: Lesiadesign is losing 300 hours a year on manual proposals. Here's where it hurts.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, creating client-ready proposals takes hours. With our system, it's done in 47 seconds, tailored to your design expertise.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Each of these issues represents ongoing, quantifiable losses for Lesiadesign.

problems.title: Time-Consuming Proposals
problems.description: Every hour spent drafting proposals is an hour lost to designing stunning websites. With 300 hours wasted yearly, that’s a significant loss in potential revenue.

problems.title: Delayed Client Engagement
problems.description: Slow proposal turnaround means potential clients wait longer, risking their interest. Each delayed response could mean a lost deal, costing thousands annually.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manually created proposals risk inconsistency in branding, undermining your professional image. This can lead to lost credibility and reduced client trust.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying skilled employees for repetitive tasks like drafting proposals is inefficient. These tasks drain thousands in labor costs that could be invested in creating value.

problems.title: Missed Opportunities
problems.description: Without a swift proposal process, Lesiadesign may miss out on time-sensitive opportunities. Each missed project could cost the company significant revenue.

problems.title: Limited Scalability
problems.description: The manual process limits how many proposals can be handled, capping growth. Inability to scale quickly translates to potential revenue left on the table.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI-driven system replaces all these inefficiencies with streamlined automation.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, it takes hours to craft a proposal. Our system delivers a complete, branded proposal in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Branding can lack consistency when done manually. Our system ensures every proposal reflects your brand perfectly every time.

solutions.title: Real-Time Client Insights
solutions.description: Currently, tracking client interactions is cumbersome. Our system provides instant insights and tracking for every proposal sent.

solutions.title: Reduced Labor Costs
solutions.description: High staff hours are spent on proposal writing. Automation slashes labor costs, freeing up resources for more critical tasks.

solutions.title: Enhanced Scalability
solutions.description: Manual methods cap how many proposals you can handle. With automation, scale your proposal output without increasing your team size.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Lesiadesign's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Lesiadesign around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Lesiadesign.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Online Presence with User-Centric Design.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We will revamp your digital touchpoints, making them beautiful and accessible to every user.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Every visitor leaving without engaging is a missed opportunity for Acme Corp.

problems.title: High Bounce Rates
problems.description: When visitors leave quickly, it signals a disconnect. Each lost visitor is potential revenue that slips away.

problems.title: Poor User Experience
problems.description: A confusing website frustrates users. This frustration can drive them to competitors.

problems.title: Lack of Mobile Optimization
problems.description: Mobile users expect seamless experiences. Losing them means losing 50% of potential customers.

problems.title: Weak Brand Identity
problems.description: A generic brand fails to stand out. This lack of differentiation costs you market share.

problems.title: Slow Load Times
problems.description: Every extra second costs 7% of your conversions. Speed is crucial for user retention.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: Your current funnel isn't capturing interest effectively. Each non-conversion is a sale lost.

proposal2.solutionIntro: We have tailored solutions to address these specific challenges Acme Corp faces.

solutions.title: Web Redesign
solutions.description: We will create a visually appealing and intuitive interface that keeps users engaged.

solutions.title: Mobile Optimization
solutions.description: Ensure your site is fully responsive and fast on all devices, capturing mobile users.

solutions.title: Performance Enhancements
solutions.description: Improve load times to keep users from bouncing, increasing potential conversions.

solutions.title: Brand Development
solutions.description: Strengthen your brand identity to make Acme Corp stand out in the market.

whyUsCards.description: Our designs are focused on accessibility and user satisfaction.
